description: Address code review issues: field name mismatch, hardcoded JWT secret, rate-limit middleware, API key auth, graceful shutdown, path sanitization, plaintext API keys, and duplicate tier constants.
steps: Add camelCase serialization layer on server responses for sessions and API keys
Remove hardcoded JWT secret fallback and throw on startup if JWT_SECRET is not set (except test env)
Wire tierRateLimit middleware into whatsapp and messages routes or remove dead code
Add X-API-Key header middleware for alternative auth on message routes
Add SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful shutdown handlers in server/src/index.ts
Sanitize phoneNumber in getSessionDir to strip non-digit characters
Hash API keys with SHA-256 before storing, return full key only on creation
Add GET /api/tiers endpoint and have dashboard fetch from it
acceptance_criteria: Server returns camelCase fields (phoneNumber, createdAt) in session and API key responses
Server refuses to start without JWT_SECRET env var (except in test mode)
Rate limit middleware is either wired or dead code is removed
X-API-Key header provides alternative authentication for message routes
Server handles SIGTERM/SIGINT gracefully, closing sockets and DB
getSessionDir strips non-digit characters from phoneNumber
API keys are hashed with SHA-256 in DB, full key returned only on creation
GET /api/tiers returns tier limits from DB, dashboard uses it
findings: All 8 review issues addressed. API keys no longer stored in plaintext (SHA-256 hash used). Rate limit middleware wired into both whatsapp and messages routes. Messages route supports both JWT and X-API-Key auth. Graceful shutdown added. Path sanitization added. Tiers endpoint created. All server and client builds pass, all tests pass.
